notes:
Farsight patch

- Version 2.1.27.
- Added a chat collapse control and persisted chat auto-scroll.
- Moved FPS and ping into the in-game top-right overlay.
- Hardened Auto-Soul and Auto-Detoxify packet scheduling to avoid overlapping other client actions.
- Fixed auto-combine so fresh singles can start a new stack after a matching stack reaches 120.
